items.title: Cameras, Sensors, and 3D Body Scans: All the Tech Helping Eliminate Blown Calls
items.summary: Soccer officials already rely on cameras to see who’s offside and who sent the ball out of bounds. But during this World Cup, refs will use digital twins of each player to view...

items.title: Framework delays Laptop 13 Pro shipments by a month
items.summary: Framework is pushing back shipments of its new Laptop 13 Pro to address issues with its haptic touchpad and display found in the run-up to mass production.
